pair_lookup_rule: Zero-based line number equals the unsigned 16-bit value decoded from the source bytes.
tail_lookup_rule: Zero-based line number equals the unsigned 8-bit value decoded from the odd trailing source byte.
selection_order: single-char [0-9A-Za-z] first in fixed ASCII sequence, then rank order
pair_selection_rule: entries immediately after the reserved tail slice, continuing for pair_table_size entries
